sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57664" key="kladeuth/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλᾰδ-ευτήριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n57664.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pruning-knife</tr_>, Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βράκετ[ρ]ον.</foreign> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n57664.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλαδευτήρια, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a festival at pruning-time</tr_>, Id. s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βίσβην</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
